# terrible_community_general_rhsm_release (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `release` (String) RHSM release version to use. To unset either pass `null` for this option, or omit this option.

### Read-Only

- `current_release` (String) The current RHSM release version value.
